campus_locations.name: Main Gate
campus_locations.directions: Located on the main road from Bheemunipatnam

campus_locations.name: Administrative Block
campus_locations.description: Principal office, exam cell, admission office
campus_locations.directions: Straight from main gate, first building on right

campus_locations.name: CSE Block
campus_locations.description: Computer Science department, labs, HOD office
campus_locations.directions: Left from main gate, second building

campus_locations.name: ECE Block
campus_locations.directions: Left from main gate, third building

campus_locations.name: Library
campus_locations.description: Central library with 50000+ books and digital resources. Open 8AM to 8PM
campus_locations.directions: Center of campus, opposite to canteen

campus_locations.name: Placement Cell
campus_locations.description: Training and Placement Office, interview rooms
campus_locations.directions: Ground floor of Admin Block, near main gate

campus_locations.name: Canteen
campus_locations.description: College canteen serving breakfast lunch and snacks. Open 7AM to 8PM
campus_locations.directions: Center of campus, opposite to library

campus_locations.name: Boys Hostel
campus_locations.description: Boys hostel with capacity of 500 inmates
campus_locations.directions: North side of campus, 5 minute walk from main gate

campus_locations.name: Girls Hostel
campus_locations.directions: South side of campus, separate entrance

campus_locations.name: Sports Ground
campus_locations.description: Cricket ground, football field, basketball court
campus_locations.directions: East side of campus, behind ECE block

campus_locations.name: Medical Centre
campus_locations.description: Campus health centre with doctor and nurse
campus_locations.directions: Near Admin Block, next to ATM

campus_locations.name: ATM
campus_locations.directions: Near main gate, next to medical centre
